commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Little days. That is, these small and feeble beginnings of the temple of God. (Challoner)
Ye of little faith shall rejoice when you shall behold Zorobabel surmounting all difficulties. (Calmet)
Plummet. Literally, "the stone of tin. "He means the builder's plummet, which Zorobabel shall hold in his hand for the finishing the building. (Challoner)
The Hebrew style all weights stones, Deuteronomy xxv. 13. (Calmet)
Eyes. The providence of God, that oversees and orders all things; (Challoner) or the assistance of the seven chief angels, Tobias xii. 15., and Apocalypse i. 4. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The tin plummet: Literally, the stone of tin. He means the builder's plummet, which Zorobabel shall hold in his hand for the finishing the building.-- Ibid.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The seven eyes: The providence of God, that oversees and orders all things.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Little days: That is, these small and feeble beginnings of the temple of God.-- Ibid.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
